2141110.name: Press Any Button Soundtrack
2141110.description: It's the soundtrack of Press Any Button. It mostly consists of public domain music - the fact that I think doesn't make it worse at all. Moreover, since the music is practically the only thing in the game that was made not by me, I'm convinced that the soundtrack is the best the game has to offer. And of course you will find those simple piano melodies composed by AI here too.
